expectations.text: Explains that the file scope is ambiguous.
expectations.evidence: Unstaged changes span multiple top-level directories (src, docs). Auto-selection requires a single changed file or one top-level directory, so scope is ambiguous without user confirmation.

expectations.text: Asks the user which files to commit next.
expectations.evidence: Ask which files to include in the commit, or have the user stage the intended scope and re-run. Candidate paths: src/report/api.py, docs/report-api.md.

expectations.text: Does not plan a push or PR.
